issue_title: fix: sidebar blank screen when opening with reasoning model
issue_body_preview:
# Fix: Sidebar blank screen when opening with thinking-capable model selected

## Description

Fixes a bug provoked by me (sorry) on #754 where the sidebar would render as a blank screen when opened via keystroke (`Ctrl+Shift+Y`) with a thinking-capable model (e.g., deepseek-r1, gpt-oss) selecte
test_description_zh: 选择一个支持推理/思考能力的模型（如 deepseek-r1），然后使用快捷键 Ctrl+Shift+Y 打开侧边栏，观察侧边栏是否正常渲染显示内容。
expected_result_zh: 侧边栏应正常打开并显示完整的聊天界面内容，不应出现空白屏幕。
